_comment: stack name -> {{STACK}} slot wording + runner/pm/lockfile facts. Source: research/00-synthesis.md §a/§c/§e, DESIGN.md §8.1-8.11. runner_prefix is the literal command prefix a gate is invoked with (R <gate>); manifest/lockfile drive stack auto-detection in lib/detect-gates.mjs and evaluate.sh.

django.label: Django
django.scaffold_hint: uv init --app . && uv run django-admin startproject config .

go.label: Go (net/http) HTTP service
go.scaffold_hint: go mod init <module> && mkdir -p cmd/app internal

springboot.label: Spring Boot (Gradle, Java 21) HTTP service
springboot.scaffold_hint: curl -sS https://start.spring.io/starter.tgz -d type=gradle-project -d language=java -d javaVersion=21 -d dependencies=web,validation -o app.tgz && tar -xzf app.tgz
